mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trip_notes WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM trip_notes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_notes (id, trip_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_notes SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE trip_notes SET is_deleted = true WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_notes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false
